Article Title: Major blow to AIADMK: 3 MLAs from Shanmugam–Velumani faction resign
Article Text:
AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami





CHENNAI; MLAs S Jayakumar (Perundurai), Maragatham Kumaravel (Maduranthakam -sc) and P Sathyabama (Dharapuram - SC) on Monday submitted their resignation to Speaker J C D Prabhakar. They were among the 25 MLAs from C Ve Shanmugam- S P Velumani camp who voted in favour of Tamiliga Vettri Kahagam govt in the vote of confidence.Sources in the AIADMK said that the three MLAs decided to resign following a promise from TVK Chief Coordinator and Minister K A Sengottaiyan that they would be accommodated and fielded in their respective constituencies in the upcoming by-elections.Meanwhile, a couple of MLA from the rebel camp called on AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami as part of the ongoing reconciliation drive. Affirming this shift toward reunification, MLAs P Haribaskar (Anthiyur), S Mohan (Panruti) and S M Sugumar (Arcot) formally called on EPS at his Greenways Road residence
Article Summary: MLAs S Jayakumar (Perundurai), Maragatham Kumaravel (Maduranthakam -sc) and P Sathyabama (Dharapuram - SC) submitted their resignation to Speaker J C D Prabhakar. They were among the 25 MLAs from C Ve Shanmugam- S P Velumani camp who voted in favour of Tamiliga Vettri Kahagam govt in the vote of confidence.

Article Title: 'People of Gujarat are yearning for change': Arvind Kejriwal
Article Text: 'People of Gujarat are yearning for change': Arvind Kejriwal
Article Summary: summarize: 'People of Gujarat are yearning for change': Arvind Kejriwal. 'People in Gujarat want to see a change in the political system,' he says. 'They want a change that will benefit the people of Gujarat,' he adds.
